creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Hong Hao from comment #28)

Hi,

can you please try "main" (CURRENT) after 952643ea452655a8e80d1b5e1cc2cae35cb73870 [ https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=952643ea452655a8e80d1b5e1cc2cae35cb73870 ]  or if you are on stable/13 chrry-pick at least that change (might be MFCed tomorrow if I find enough time but otherwise will be a few more days) and see if that improves the situation for you for the "XXX ERROR lkpi_80211_txq_tx_one: skb alloc failed"?
